*Welcome...to BETA HFIL*

Get early access to videos!
Patreon:

--------------------------------
**Directed & Edited By**
Scott Frerichs

**Created & Written By**
Curtis Arnott
Nick Landis
Scott Frerichs

**Animated By**
EnviousChimera🐐🐉 @ChimeraEnvy
Devil Artemis @DevilArtemis  
is Cruz @JumpNJetz   
0zner @O_zner  
SXR123 @SXR123_YT  

**Composed by**
Cliff Weinstein

**Additional Music from**
Epidemic Sound

**Additional Art Provided by**
BrachyZoid
CitricKing

**Cast**
Curtis Arnott as Cell, Lord Slug
Devil Artemis as King Cold
Wes Wiggins as Psych
Nick Landis as Bojack, Neiz, Raditz
Connor McKinley as Cooler
Elsie Lovelock as Zangya
xthedarkone as Dore
Tom Schalk as Sauza
MasakoX as Turles
Joshua Gotay at Broly

**Special Thanks to All Our Patrons & Supporters!**

title.simpleText: DragonBall Z Abridged: Episode 10 Part 3 - TeamFourStar (TFS)

subtitle.simpleText: Team Four Star's Dragonball Z Abridged Parody follows the adventures of Goku, Gohan, Krillin, Piccolo, Vegeta and the rest of the Z Warriors as they gather Dragonballs and fight intergalactic evil. With the comedic writings of Lanipator, Takahata101, and Kaiserneko this may not be the DBZ you remember but TFS hopes you enjoy it all the same. How high can the Krillin Owned Count get? Who will be the next to go Super Saiyan? Can Vegeta's ego get any bigger? Find out NOW on DBZ Abridged!

subtitle.simpleText:
TeamFourStar presents Final Fantasy7: Machinabridged (FF7MA) the complete series!

Final Fantasy VII (FF7) came out in 1997 on the Sony Playstation and has since been a main stay to the series for fans all over the world. Join Cloud, Tifa, Aerith, Barret, Red XIII, Yuffie, Cait Sith, Vincent, and Cid in this new TFS abridged series!

channelMetadataRenderer.title: TeamFourStar
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Our Team:

Scott “KaiserNeko” Frerichs
TFS Founder, Chief Editor, Actor, co-creator and writer for DBZA, writer for HUA, showrunner for “X Minutes”

Nick “ @Lanipator ” Landis
TFS Founder, Actor, co-creator and writer for DBZA

Curt “Takahata101” Arnott
TFS Founder, Actor, co-creator and writer for DBZA, FF7MA, and HUA

Stephan Krosecz
Creative Lead, Animator, Editor, creator and writer for Unabridged, Fist Master

Jesse Nowack
Actor, Editor, thirst trap

Tyler Coy
Cinematographer, Camera Operator, chaos gremlin

Lawrence “MasakoX” Simpson
Actor, Editor, Professional Brit

Cliff Weinstein
Music composer, creator of albums!

Jacob Quinn
Manager, Lawyer, Bookkeeper, and whatever else is needed
